title: Gokarnanatheshwara Temple
tagline: Gokarnanatheshwara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Gokarnanatheshwara Temple, otherwise known as Kudroli Sri Gokarnanatha Kshetra, is in the Kudroli area of Mangalore in Karnataka, India.
overview.description: The Gokarnanatheshwara Temple, otherwise known as Kudroli Sri Gokarnanatha Kshetra, is in the Kudroli area of Mangalore in Karnataka, India. It was consecrated by Narayana Guru. It is dedicated to Gokarnanatha, a form of Lord Shiva. This temple was built in 1912 by Adhyaksha HoigeBazar Koragappa.

topPlaces.name: Mariyamma Temple
topPlaces.description: The Mariyamma Temple is situated in Boloor, India, dedicated to Goddess Mariyamma, situated approximately 5 km from Mangaladevi Temple in Mangalore city, Karnataka, India. It is believed that Mariyamma and Mangaladevi were sisters.

topPlaces.name: Kudroli Bhagavathi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Kudroli Shri Bhagavathi Kshetra is a temple located in the heart of the city in Kodialbail, Mangalore in Karnataka. This temple has an 800-year-old history and this is the only temple where 14 Goddesses Bhagavathi are worshiped in three different names: Shri Cheerumbha Bhagavathi (4 forms), Shri Padangara Bhagavathi (5 forms), Shri Pullurali Bhagavathi (5 forms) which is why this temple is called Koota Kala among the 18 bhagavathi temples situated in the States of Karnataka and Kerala states together.

topPlaces.name: Kalikamba Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Kalikamba Vinayaka Temple is located in Lower Car Street, Mangalore, India. The temple is mainly revered by the Vishwakarma Brahmana community (people involved in the goldsmith, blacksmith, carpentry and architecture businesses).

topPlaces.name: Swami Vivekananda Planetarium
topPlaces.description: Swami Vivekananda Planetarium, also called Pilikula Planetarium, at Pilikula Nisargadhama in Mangaluru is a 3D planetarium in India: the first of its kind in the country. It is also the only such planetarium in the country with hybrid modern technology innovations coupled with 3D technology of 8K digital and opto-mechanical (hybrid) projection system.

topPlaces.name: Harekala
topPlaces.description: Harekala is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mangalore taluk of Dakshina Kannada district.

topPlaces.name: Puthige, Dakshina Kannada
topPlaces.description: Puthige is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Talipady
topPlaces.description: Talipady is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mangalore taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Suralpady
topPlaces.description: Suralpady also known as Badagulipady is a suburban town located in Mangalore City of Dakshina Kannada district in the state of Karnataka, India. Suralpady lies between Moodbidri & Mangalore city in National highway 169 (Old no NH-13).

items.note: The Mariyamma Temple is situated in Boloor, India, dedicated to Goddess Mariyamma, situated approximately 5 km from Mangaladevi Temple in Mangalore city, Karnataka, India. It is believed that Mariyamma and Mangaladevi were sisters.

The Kudroli Shri Bhagavathi Kshetra is a temple located in the heart of the city in Kodialbail, Mangalore in Karnataka. This temple has an 800-year-old history and this is the only temple where 14 Goddesses Bhagavathi are worshiped in three different names: Shri Cheerumbha Bhagavathi (4 forms), Shri Padangara Bhagavathi (5 forms), Shri Pullurali Bhagavathi (5 forms) which is why this temple is called Koota Kala among the 18 bhagavathi temples situated in the States of Karnataka and Kerala states together.

Sri Kalikamba Vinayaka Temple is located in Lower Car Street, Mangalore, India. The temple is mainly revered by the Vishwakarma Brahmana community (people involved in the goldsmith, blacksmith, carpentry and architecture businesses).

Swami Vivekananda Planetarium, also called Pilikula Planetarium, at Pilikula Nisargadhama in Mangaluru is a 3D planetarium in India: the first of its kind in the country. It is also the only such planetarium in the country with hybrid modern technology innovations coupled with 3D technology of 8K digital and opto-mechanical (hybrid) projection system.
Harekala is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mangalore taluk of Dakshina Kannada district.
Puthige is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India.
Talipady is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Mangalore taluk of Dakshina Kannada district in Karnataka.

Suralpady also known as Badagulipady is a suburban town located in Mangalore City of Dakshina Kannada district in the state of Karnataka, India. Suralpady lies between Moodbidri & Mangalore city in National highway 169 (Old no NH-13).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gokarnanatheshwara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gokarnanatheshwara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gokarnanatheshwara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gokarnanatheshwara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gokarnanatheshwara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gokarnanatheshwara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Gokarnanatheshwara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gokarnanatheshwara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mariyamma Temple, Kudroli Bhagavathi Temple, Kalikamba Temple, Swami Vivekananda Planetarium, Harekala.
